task_description: Wave 1 continued: Wire QuantChat WebSocket for live messaging, QuantAI real SSE streaming (kill fake setInterval), QuantMail compose/inbox/thread fully through proxy, and cross-app token management. These are the critical production-readiness items that transform stubs into working features.

verification.summary: All 20 turbo tasks pass typecheck. Build succeeds for all 5 packages. Tests: 193 (quantchat) + 180 (quantai) + 246 (quantmail) + 31 (api-client) + realtime all green. Lint clean. Semantic review approved (v2) with 2 minor non-blocking issues noted.
